title: TikTok Creator Search Insights playbook — content-gap arbitrage
html:
Screenshot of a marketing-thread post Yahir saved that frames TikTok Creator Search Insights as "Google Search Console for TikTok marketers." The case study: searching the gap "most important thing in a relationship" was exploding (264K, +588%); they built into it and got 10x engagement. Yahir's TL;DR for himself — stop posting random features, mine search-gap keywords first.

TL;DR

  • creator search insights surfaces "topics with content gap" — high search volume, low quality supply — directly inside TikTok search.
  • Workflow: search → spot gap → produce exactly the title/hashtags/script TikTok recommends → ship.
  • Yahir is filing this as the discovery-engine to apply against brotein and the aeo agency funnel content — same logic as AEO but on TikTok-side.

creator search insights · brotein · aeo agency · ai search optimization · content gap arbitrage
